content.text: I’ll search for the assertion implementation, especially the `isJson` validator.
I found the assertion runtime as the likely location and will inspect it next.

I found the assertion runtime and its existing `isJson` tests; it currently explicitly rejects arrays, which matches the reported bug. I’ll first add a regression test that expects arrays of strings to pass and run it to confirm the failure.

input.old_string:
const isJson = typeof obj === 'object' && obj !== null && !Array.isArray(obj)
      && Object.prototype.toString.call(obj) === '[object Object]';
input.new_string:
const isJson = typeof obj === 'object' && obj !== null

content.content: The file /testbed/packages/bruno-js/src/runtime/assert-runtime.js has been updated successfully.

tool_use_result.oldString:
const isJson = typeof obj === 'object' && obj !== null && !Array.isArray(obj)
      && Object.prototype.toString.call(obj) === '[object Object]';
tool_use_result.newString:
const isJson = typeof obj === 'object' && obj !== null
      && (Array.isArray(obj) || Object.prototype.toString.call(obj) === '[object Object]');

lines: // Objects created inside Node's vm.createContext() have a different Object constructor,
// so obj.constructor === Object fails for objects passed via res.setBody() from scripts.
// Note: toString check is more permissive than constructor check — custom class instances
-    const isJson = typeof obj === 'object' && obj !== null && !Array.isArray(obj)
+    const isJson = typeof obj === 'object' && obj !== null
this.assert(isJson, `expected ${utils.inspect(obj)} to be JSON`, `expected ${utils.inspect(obj)} not to be JSON`);

input.command: git restore -- "packages/bruno-js/tests/runtime.spec.js" && git diff -- "packages/bruno-js/src/runtime/assert-runtime.js" && git status --short
input.description: Remove temporary test and show remaining diff

content.text:
Implemented the fix.

What changed:
- Updated `packages/bruno-js/src/runtime/assert-runtime.js`
- The custom `isJson` Chai assertion now treats arrays as valid JSON values, in addition to plain objects.
- This fixes `res.body: isJson` for responses like:

```json
[
  "A55001213ZX0A"
]
```

Validation:
- Added a temporary regression test for `res.body isJson` with an array of strings.
- Confirmed it failed before the fix.
- Applied the fix.
- Reran the test successfully.
- Restored the temporary test changes as requested.

Command used for validation:

```bash
npm test --workspace=packages/bruno-js -- --runTestsByPath tests/runtime.spec.js --runInBand
```

No commits were made.
